name: Absolute Wonder Woman
description:
~Come closer, I come from hell but I don't bite haha~

This is my first ever bot, but I did it simply because of a personal, and petty, issue of mine. Every Absolute Diana bot that I saw always had a hero×civilian premise, and that pissed me off, so I made a hero×hero premise just for yall, but in truth just myself.

(She sees you fighting the demons as well and asks to join you)
creator: Johnny_jones
